name: backoffice
comment:overrides: Force a single copy of the AI SDK core so provider-defined tools (Anthropic web search, Vertex googleSearch grounding) share one Schema brand with `ai` — without this, ai@6 pins provider@3.0.10 while the providers pull newer patch versions, causing tool-type clashes. Keep these pinned to what the installed providers depend on (currently @ai-sdk/anthropic@3.0.95).
